title: QS World University Rankings: JGU ranks 35 in Law, ranked No. 1 Indian Law School for 7th time
description: The OP Jindal Global University (JGU) has achieved a milestone in the QS World University Rankings by Subject 2026, securing the 35th spot globally when it comes to law and legal studies and retaining its position as the top-ranked law school in India for the 7th consecutive year.The University has also delivered exceptional performance across politics and international studies, business and management, arts and humanities, economics, and social sciences.In the latest rankings, JGU's politics an
